subject: feat(chart): add user-selectable forecast horizon presets
body:
Forecast horizon was hardcoded to 90 days. Now users can choose 1M, 3M,
6M, or 1Y via preset buttons alongside the history lookback presets.
State owned by WorkspaceDashboard (drives forecast computation),
CashflowGraph emits changes. Labels distinguish the two control groups.

Tags: chart, forecast, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard
Semver: minor
